name: fast-skills
description: Depth pack for USENIX FAST storage-paper routing, the two-deadline HotCRP cycle, USENIX double-blind review and one-shot revision, storage-specific evaluation, USENIX artifact badging, and the free open-access camera-ready.

plugins.name: fast-skills
plugins.description: Twelve FAST-specific skills for the USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies, covering its storage discipline, two-deadline USENIX double-blind cycle, one-shot revision, and artifact badging, grounded in the FAST '26/'27 calls, the USENIX artifact policy, ACM Digital Library, and dblp.
